nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulawesi babbler
nodes.summary: Sulawesi babbler（Pellorneum celebense）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sulawesi babbler。

nodes.name: Pellorneum
nodes.summary: Pellorneum（Pellorneum）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如棕头幽鹛、褐冠幽鹛、Malayan black-capped babbler等15种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulawesi babbler
nodes.summary: The Sulawesi babbler (Pellorneum celebense) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is endemic to Indonesia. References Collar, N. J. & Robson, C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers) pp. 70 – 291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.
nodes.shortSummary: The Sulawesi babbler (Pellorneum celebense) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is endemic to Indonesia.
